name: Easy Chocolate Zucchini Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 10-inch tube pan.
3. Combine the dry cake mix and cinnamon in a large mixing bowl.
4. Add eggs, oil, and water; blend together.
5. Beat for an additional 2 minutes at medium speed.
6. Fold in the shredded zucchini.
7. Pour batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
8. Bake at 350°F for 50-60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Allow cooling in the pan on a rack for 25 minutes.
10. Remove from the pan and cool completely on a rack.
11. For frosting, beat cream cheese, butter, and vanilla extract in a bowl.
12. Gradually add powdered sugar and milk until creamy.
13. Spread frosting over the cooled cake.
14. Sprinkle with chopped nuts.
15. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
